case_title: SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY VS. DANESHA MCCOY et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY AS TO DEFENDANT MCCOY, DANESHA DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY SERVED OCT-15-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MCCOY, DANESHA
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT ; PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT TO POSSESSION FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY SERVED OCT-15-2011, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE

APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT MCCOY, DANESHA HEARING SET FOR JAN-11-2012 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206

APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF JURY FEES AND EXPENSES PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT MCCOY, DANESHA HEARING SET FOR JAN-11-2012 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT MCCOY, DANESHA
DEMAND FOR JURY AND MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE FILED BY DEFENDANT MCCOY, DANESHA
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY ALSO FILED BY DEFENDANT MCCOY, DANESHA

MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON JAN-11-2012 IN 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT DANESHA MCCOY'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT GRANTED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 AS TO DEFENDANT MCCOY, DANESHA

MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON JAN-11-2012 IN 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT DANESHA MCCOY'S WAIVER OF ADDITIONAL COURT FEES AND COSTS. APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT DENIED THE APPLICATION AS TO WAIVER OF JURY FEES & EXPENSES SINCE CASE HAS SETTLED. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF JURY FEE AND EXPENSES PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 AS TO DEFENDANT MCCOY, DANESHA
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY
ORDER GRANTING PLAINTIFF'S EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MCCOY, DANESHA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1894 SUNNYDALE AVENUE, SAN FRANCISCO, LEASE FORFEITED, INCLUDING TENTANTS, SUBTENENANTS, AND NAMED CLAIMANTS IF ANY. SEE SCANNED DOC
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $12.80 FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT MCCOY, DANESHA
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT MCCOY, DANESHA
